milLog.name: F07 Number Station
milLog.desc: Unidentified numbers station. Female voice reading groups of five-digit numbers in French.
milLog.sound: Female voice, French language, structured 5-digit number groups. End of message: 0000.

milLog.name: STANAG 5065 Link-11
milLog.desc: NATO Link-11 tactical data link. Ships and aircraft share tactical picture in real time.
milLog.sound: 16-tone FSK signal. Characteristic warbling sound instantly recognisable to naval operators.

milLog.name: HFDVL (HF Data and Voice Link)
milLog.desc: Australian Defence Force HF Data and Voice Link. STANAG-compatible ADF system.
milLog.sound: ADF-specific framing around standard STANAG waveforms. Australian regional HF net.

milLog.name: PACTOR II/III/IV
milLog.desc: PACTOR digital modes used by military, NGO, and winlink stations.
milLog.sound: Distinctive handshake tones followed by rapid data transfer. PACTOR IV sounds like broadband hash.

milLog.name: Coquelet Teleprinter
milLog.desc: French military Coquelet teleprinter system. Multi-channel VFT over HF.
milLog.sound: French military VFT tones. Regular structure, consistent channel spacing.

sv.name: TIV 3 (Concept)
sv.desc: Concept armored intercept vehicle. Reinforced titanium hull, full sensor suite. EF5 concept.
sv.flavor: The TIV 3 concept exists only in blueprints and dreams. But what dreams they are.
sv.note: Theoretical EF5 intercept capability. Retractable probe arms. 360 camera array concept.
